notes.widget_tap: EventRowView uses Link(destination: url) where url = EventFetcher.calendarURL(for: event.startDate) -> CalendarURL.forDate(date)
notes.rules_preview_tap: RulesPreviewView wraps EventPreviewRow in Button { UIApplication.shared.open(url) } using CalendarURL.forDate(item.event.startDate)
notes.accessibility: previewRow_tap_N on RulesPreviewView rows; eventRow_<eventIdentifier> on widget rows
notes.shared_location: CalendarURL in Shared/SharedConstants.swift, accessible from both app and widget targets
notes.no_force_unwraps: Uses if let url = url pattern throughout
